description: Plugin-distributed hooks for developer-relations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags DevRel anti-patterns (vanity metric reported with no activation/adoption metric, content/program with no journey stage, community claim with no funnel stage). Set DEVREL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
